description_long: This is a tall, slender obelisk constructed from what appears to be white or light gray marble, standing on a square stone base. The shaft of the obelisk is smooth and tapers gradually to a pointed tip, which is capped with a small, darker element. One face of the obelisk features an inscription, likely commemorative, engraved in a formal, serif typeface. The base is a simple, unadorned square platform, slightly wider than the shaft, providing stability and a subtle visual transition to the ground. The surface of the obelisk shows some natural marbling and weathering, giving it a dignified, aged appearance. There are no visible decorative motifs or surrounding features, emphasizing the monument's solemn and commemorative function.
description: A tall, marble obelisk with a pointed tip, standing on a square stone base and featuring an engraved inscription on one face. The surface is smooth with subtle marbling and weathering.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth marble shaft and the square base, with no visible inscription.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the tapering shaft and the marbled texture, inscription not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the smooth, unadorned marble surface and the square base.
description_view_3: Front face with a visible engraved inscription, showing the formal commemorative text and the clean lines of the obelisk.
attribute_inscription: One face (view 3) has an engraved inscription in English, using a formal serif font. The text is centered and appears to be commemorative, though some words are partially legible due to image quality.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple, square stone platform, slightly wider than the obelisk shaft, with clean edges and no decorative features. It appears solid and functional, providing stability.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply pointed and capped with a small, darker element, possibly metal or weathered stone, with no visible ornamentation.
